prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GOLDKITCOP-7PC-AMZ-HPN Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 7pc Gold Prospecting Kit 1/8 Mesh Classifier, 14" & 10" Green Gold Pans, Recovery Tools, Tweezers with Magnifier Description: The ASR Outdoor 7 Piece Gold Prospecting Kit comes with everything you’ll need to pan, sift, pick up and store gold and gems. Inside the kit, you’ll find a sifting classifier, 2 dual riffle gold sifting pans, 3 fine gold recovery tools, and a magnifying tweezer.

The classifier included has a mesh size of 1/8”, making it a great size for sifting coarser materials. It has a wire thickness of 1.4mm and is constructed of heavy-duty plastic that is designed to fit easily on a standard 5-gallon bucket.

Each kit comes with 2 deep dual riffle sifting pans in 2 sizes: 14” diameter and 10” diameter. The pans both fit neatly inside of the sifter, and the green color makes it easier to spot gold flakes in silt and sand.

The last 4 accessories included in this kit are fine gold recovery tools, all of which will assist you in picking up, inspecting, and storing your findings. The tweezer features a 4X magnification power and the 4oz suction tool can be used to pick up gold flakes.

This complete gold panning kit is a great gift idea for all types of prospectors, whether they are just starting out or are expert gold panners. Teaching children how to prospect is also a wonderful way to spend quality time outdoors while learning a new skill. Make sure to grab this set for yourself or a friend who loves gold panning, it just might pay off. Search Terms: sluice box accessories; gold prospecting kit with classifiers; gold panning kit; gold panning equipment; rock crusher Features: - GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: 7 Piece Gold Prospecting kit comes with everything you’ll need to pan, sift, pick up and store gold (1) sifting classifier, (2) dual riffle gold sifting pans, (3) fine gold recovery tools (1) magnifying tweezer - 1/8 CLASSIFYING SCREEN: Classifier included has a wire mesh size of 1/8”, making it a great size for sifting coarser materials; Designed to fit easily on a standard 5 gallon bucket - COLLECTION TOOLS: Kit comes with 4 fine gold recovery tools designed to help you collect, clean and store your findings - DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS: Kit includes dual riffle gold panning pans that are easy for beginners to use; a 14 inch and 10 inch pan; both gold pans fit neatly inside of the classifier, and the green color makes it easier to spot gold flakes in silt and black sand - SPECIFICATIONS: 7 piece kit; Materials: glass, plastic, steel; Colors: assorted; Items included: 1 classifier, 2 gold pans, 3 collection tools, 1 magnifying tweezer === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 7pc Gold Prospecting Kit with Classifier and Pans

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 7-pc Green Gold Prospecting Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: 18 Inch Mesh Classifier, 14 Inch And 10 Inch Dual Riffle Pans, Magnifying Tweezer, Recovery Tools, Bucket Fit

openai.title_differentiation: 18" Classifier Fits 5 Gallon Bucket, 14" And 10" Dual Riffle Green Pans, 4 Gold Recovery Tools, 4X Magnifier
